3234900.name: Durak With Friends
3234900.description: Durak is classic Russian card game that can be played with 3 or more players and this is my personal interpretation of the rules. In Durak With Friends you'll be taking on exiting matches with friends, family or even complete randoms if you so wish. I made this game because I couldn't get enough of Durak during recess hours in school and wanted to play in class and at home whenever I liked. Hope you enjoy it as much as I do:)
